artifacts.name: planner
artifacts.description: Planning agent that decomposes approved specifications into ordered, dependency-aware, estimation-bounded work items with clear acceptance targets.

artifacts.name: product-manager
artifacts.description: Enterprise product shaping agent that turns ideas into a clear problem frame, success criteria, scope boundaries, and non-functional requirements before specification and planning.

artifacts.name: router
artifacts.description: Continue routing agent that classifies incoming work and hands off to the right workflow and next agent based on intent, readiness, and constraints.

artifacts.name: spec-writer
artifacts.description: Specification agent that transforms requests into clear, testable, and scoped specs with measurable acceptance criteria and explicit exclusions.

artifacts.name: graph-memory
artifacts.description: Memory policy for graph-backed knowledge in Linxmd. Defines what should be stored, validated, and invalidated in graph-memory; command interaction details are defined in skill graph.

artifacts.name: graph
artifacts.description: CLI-only interaction protocol for Continue graph-memory. Defines how agents read, query, and write graph data via opencode-continue graph-memory commands.

artifacts.name: coninue
artifacts.description: Bootstrap pack for Continue-first development. Starts with graph CLI interaction, graph memory policy, and product shaping as the first enterprise gate.
